Hi! The spreadsheet everyone uses is Flares' which can be found here: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1cC7FOebdy_J2hONmVT1QUSk6SxIRTuVoI4XADVlq5JU/edit?gid=110428514#gid=110428514

do note that even though flares is the biggest english content creator rn for morimens, he is biased toward blue and yellow realm.

the section you want to look at is at the bottom (Costco (Arc 1) build). Substitute greed rare wheel for gluttony if you have trouble with surviveability. His start + endgame team comp is a bit dated, and I don't recommend playing the ones he have listed there aside from ghelot (e2 necessary for story, e3 good for endgame). 

Here is my recommended team comps:

pick a dps you can easily get copies of right now {jenkins, doresain, pollux, kath, castor} and build around them.
All of these are great at e3.

Jenkins is awesome: she's a standard unit and a great sub dps/support in end game. She is argueably the strongest dps aside from uvhash in the standard pool.

Doresain: excellent character early game IF you have thais or pickman (you want someone who can generate devour babies). Thus, I don't recommend playing him until you get these characters (thais wants e2).

Pollux: most recent dps addition. Needs some sustain. I dont know much about him, but i heard he's good even at e1. 

Castor: best shielder in ultra at e0, top tier dps at e3. 

Kath: e3 is absolutely necessary for her to function. she is great at shielding and dealing damage.

In full honestly, you can clear story with a lot of different characters. So you can do whatever you want. However, the dps i listed above are used even in end game, so it would a natural progression from story -> dtide.
